ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Contract Signed for PACS service line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Post Acute Care Services Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Contract Signed") && (ISNULL(Contract_Customer_Signed_Date__c )|| ISNULL(Actual_Start_Date__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Contract Signed Date and Actual Start Date.
